inputs.label: R-squared (R²)
inputs.businessContext: The coefficient of determination from the regression model, ranging from 0 to 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: The coefficient of determination from the regression model, ranging from 0 to 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Regresyon modelinden belirleme katsayısı, 0 ile 1 arasında değişir.

inputs.label: Sample Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of observations in the dataset.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of observations in the dataset.

inputs.label: Number of Predictors (p)
inputs.businessContext: Number of independent variables in the regression model, excluding the constant term.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of independent variables in the regression model, excluding the constant term.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Regresyon modelindeki sabit terim hariç bağımsız değişken sayısı.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the final result.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the final result.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nihai sonucun yuvarlanması için ondalık basamak sayısı.
